title: Chinas Coal Imports From Mongolia Set Another Record In December
section_path: Chinas Coal Imports From Mongolia Set Another Record In December
section_path_text: Chinas Coal Imports From Mongolia Set Another Record In December
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
December saw coal imports from Indonesia total 21.1 million tons, which is up from November by 2.8 million tons (15%) and up year-on-year by 4 million tons (23%). This has also marked the largest amount imported since March. Imports from Mongolia totaled a record 8 million tons.
